invalid_review_attempts_not_counted.reason: The earlier CLI invocation completed but did not return a review verdict JSON and is therefore preserved only as command evidence, not as the valid pack-level Claude review.

parsed_review.raw_review_summary: CP00-062 closes the metadata-only UI Operator Surface Synthetic Fixture Set boundary for RP00.P04.M06.S01-S08. Plan binding, CP00-061 upstream consumption, no-write/no-runtime/no-leak boundaries, fixture catalogue determinism, validators, tests, README, contract, fixture, and RP00 validator coverage are mutually consistent. The only finding was one non-blocking P3 note asking for clarification that blocked receipts keep a static next_subphase handoff while source_micro_phase_completed=false prevents closeout use.

p3.title: Blocked-path result advertises next_subphase past an incomplete micro-phase
p3.detail: Claude noted that blocked results keep next_subphase RP00.P04.M07.S01 while source_micro_phase_completed is false. This is intentional static handoff metadata and not persisted as closeout state. A clarifying code comment was added in assembleControlPlaneUiOperatorSurfaceSyntheticFixtureSet.

boundary_checks.source_micro_phase_completion: RP00.P04.M06 completed; RP00.P04 open; next RP00.P04.M07.S01

notes: Pre-review syntax checks passed for policies, service, validators, service tests, and the RP00 validator.
The focused service suite passed with 652/652 tests.
The pre-evidence RP00 validator failure was expected and limited to missing CP00-062 evidence files.
No P0, P1, or P2 findings were reported.
The single P3 note was fixed without running a second valid Claude review.
